'''鈭歷-dh-y-dh''' ('''kavadhyedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zinc|zinc]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-dh-y-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zinc|zinc]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-dh-y-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kavadhyedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivadhyedhoko|thivadhyedhoko]] || [[word:jivadhyedhoko|jivadhyedhoko]] || [[word:shivadhyedhoko|shivadhyedhoko]] || [[word:kivadhyedhoko|kivadhyedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvadhyedhoko|thuthuvadhyedhoko]] || [[word:jujuvadhyedhoko|jujuvadhyedhoko]] || [[word:shushuvadhyedhoko|shushuvadhyedhoko]] || [[word:kukuvadhyedhoko|kukuvadhyedhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
